mapper.sql: select ci.content_id, ci.title, ci.summary, ci.content, ci.category_id, ci.author, ci.cover_image, ci.content_type, ci.status, ci.view_count, ci.like_count, ci.comment_count, ci.share_count, ci.is_recommended, ci.is_top, ci.publish_time, ci.tags, ci.source_url, ci.create_by, ci.create_time, ci.update_by, ci.update_time, ci.remark, cc.category_name, cu.user_id as author_user_id from content_info ci left join content_category cc on ci.category_id = cc.category_id left join content_user cu on ci.create_by = cu.user_name
mapper.select:
and ci.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') and ci.category_id = #{categoryId} and ci.author like concat('%', #{author}, '%') and ci.content_type = #{contentType} and ci.status = '0' and ci.tags like concat('%', #{tags}, '%')
order by ci.is_top desc, ci.publish_time desc

where ci.status = '0' order by ( ci.view_count * 1 + ci.like_count * 5 + ci.comment_count * 8 + ci.share_count * 10 + CASE WHEN ci.is_recommended = '1' THEN 100 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ci.is_top = '1' THEN 200 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ci.publish_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 50 WHEN ci.publish_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 72 HOUR) THEN 20 WHEN ci.publish_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 168 HOUR) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END ) desc, ci.publish_time desc limit 20
where ci.status = '0' and ci.is_top = '1' order by ci.publish_time desc
select content_id from content_view_history where user_id = #{userId} order by view_time desc limit 50

choose.when: order by ci.view_count desc, ci.publish_time desc
order by ci.like_count desc, ci.publish_time desc
choose.otherwise: order by ci.is_top desc, ci.publish_time desc

mapper.insert:
insert into content_info
title, summary, content, category_id, author, cover_image, content_type, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, share_count, is_recommended, is_top, publish_time, tags, source_url, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{categoryId}, #{author}, #{coverImage}, #{contentType}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{shareCount}, #{isRecommended}, #{isTop}, #{publishTime}, #{tags}, #{sourceUrl}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update content_info set view_count = view_count + 1 where content_id = #{contentId}
update content_info set like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{increment}, 0) where content_id = #{contentId}
update content_info set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where content_id = #{contentId}
update content_info set comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) where content_id = #{contentId}
update content_info set share_count = share_count + 1 where content_id = #{contentId}
mapper.delete:
delete from content_info where content_id in
#{contentId}
mapper.select: select count(*) as total, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as approved, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as pending, sum(case when status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as rejected, sum(case when date(create_time) = curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as todayNew, coalesce(sum(view_count), 0) as totalViews, coalesce(sum(like_count), 0) as totalLikes, coalesce(sum(comment_count), 0) as totalComments from content_info
select content_type as contentType, count(*) as count from content_info where status = '0' group by content_type
select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as count from content_info where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 7 day) group by date(create_time) order by date(create_time) asc

SELECT tag, COUNT(*) as count FROM ( SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(ci.tags, ',', n.n), ',', -1)) as tag FROM content_info ci CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 as n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) n WHERE ci.status = '0' AND ci.tags IS NOT NULL AND ci.tags != '' AND n.n <= LENGTH(ci.tags) - LENGTH(REPLACE(ci.tags, ',', '')) + 1 ) t WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND tag != '' GROUP BY tag ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_info WHERE create_by = (SELECT user_name FROM content_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND status = '0'
